steps: Go to https://console.cloud.google.com and log in with your Google account
Create a new project or select an existing one from the top navigation bar
Go to APIs & Services > Library and enable the specific Maps APIs you need (e.g. Maps JavaScript API, Geocoding API, Places API)
Go to APIs & Services > Credentials at https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials
Copy the generated API key from the dialog
Optionally click 'Edit API key' to add application restrictions and API restrictions for security

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Google Maps Platform API key passed as the 'key' query parameter in requests

notes: $200 monthly free credit included for all new accounts
Billing must be enabled on the Google Cloud project to use the API beyond the free tier
The key is created instantly and available immediately after creation
Restrict the key to specific APIs and IP addresses/referrers to prevent unauthorized usage
Each Maps API (Geocoding, Places, Directions, etc.) must be individually enabled in the API Library

test_endpoint.description: Geocode an address to verify the API key is active and the Geocoding API is enabled
